responseMessageContents.text:
The user is asking me to "send the security box" - based on the conversation context, they're working through an IVX IA deployment executor audit. The previous assistant was auditing runtime tokens and found that GitHub tokens were expired/missing in the sandbox. The user seems to want me to present a clear request for credentials so they can provide them.

Let me look at what was happening - the previous assistant found:
- `GITHUB_TOKEN` in sandbox env: MISSING
- `GITHUB_TOKEN` in expo/.env: 401 EXPIRED
- `RENDER_API_KEY` in expo/.env: ACTIVE (200)
- `SUPABASE_URL`/`SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`: MISSING in sandbox

The user says "Send the security box I will do now" - they want me to present a credential request form so they can input the needed credentials. I should use `requestEnvs` to ask for the missing/invalid credentials.

Let me check what's needed based on the private environment variables available and the audit findings:

From `<private_environment_variables>`:
- GITHUB_REPO_URLS
- GITHUB_TOKEN  
- RENDER_API_KEY
- RENDER_SERVICE_ID
- SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
- SUPABASE_URL

These are listed as available but the sandbox may not have them populated. The user wants to provide them. Let me present a credentials form.

Based on the IVX IA independence mission, they need:
1. A valid GitHub token with Contents Read & Write access
2. Possibly Render API key (though one was found in expo/.env)
3. Supabase credentials

Let me ask for the GitHub token since that was the main blocker - the old fine-grained token was expired (401).

Actually, looking more carefully at the private environment variables listed, they're currently set up in the environment. Let me check if they're actually available by testing them.

Wait, the user said "Send the security boxe I will do now" - they want me to present the credential input form so they can fill in the tokens. Let me use requestEnvs to present the key credentials they need to provide/replace.

The main blocker was the GitHub token being expired. Let me request all the potentially needed credentials.

envs.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envs.description: GitHub classic PAT (ghp_) with Contents Read & Write access for ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest

envs.name: RENDER_API_KEY
envs.description: Render API key for ivx-holdings-platform service deploy control

envs.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
envs.description: Supabase service_role key for admin database operations

input.reason: IVX IA deployment executor needs valid credentials: GitHub token (previous fine-grained PAT expired with 401), Render API key for deploy control, and Supabase keys for database audit.

responseMessageContents.inputArgsStr: {"envs": [{"name": "GITHUB_TOKEN", "description": "GitHub classic PAT (ghp_) with Contents Read & Write access for ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest", "placeholder": "ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "isPublic": false}, {"name": "RENDER_API_KEY", "description": "Render API key for ivx-holdings-platform service deploy control", "placeholder": "rnd_xxxxxxxxxxxx", "isPublic": false}, {"name": "SUPABASE_URL", "description": "Supabase project URL (e.g. https://xxxxxxxxxx.supabase.co)", "placeholder": "https://xxxxxxxxxx.supabase.co", "isPublic": false}, {"name": "SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY", "description": "Supabase service_role key for admin database operations", "placeholder": "eyJhbGciOi...", "isPublic": false}], "reason": "IVX IA deployment executor needs valid credentials: GitHub token (previous fine-grained PAT expired with 401), Render API key for deploy control, and Supabase keys for database audit."}
